examples: Presently the Welshman said, "My boy, don't be afraid of me."
The Welshman almost jumped out of his chair.
The Welshman had to tell the story of the night to the visitors.
Swede Henrik Stenson, Australian left-hander Richard Green and Welshman Garry Houston share second place following 67s.
The Welshman admitted he was as surprised as anyone about the margin of his victory.
